summary: The user sought advice on mounting a new 4K TV purchased from Best Buy for $350 and organizing their sneaker collection, which now includes around 5-6 pairs. They also discussed budgeting strategies, including tracking expenses and using cashback apps like Rakuten, from which they redeemed $25 for an Amazon gift card.
facts: The user purchased a 4K TV from Best Buy for $350.
The user bought a pair of sneakers from Foot Locker for 30% off during Black Friday.
The user has around 5-6 pairs of sneakers in their collection.
The user spent approximately $500 on Black Friday purchases.
The user has been using a budgeting app to track their expenses.
The user redeemed $25 worth of points for an Amazon gift card through Rakuten.
The user is trying to be more mindful of their spending habits.
The user plans to use the Amazon gift card during the holiday season.
